auth_admin_welcome: ✅ Authorization successful! Hello, Super Admin. 👑 You are logged in as Super Administrator.
auth_not_linked: ℹ️ Your account is registered, but you are not currently linked to any family. 💡 If this is an error, press {btn_support} below to notify the administrator.
auth_already: ✅ You are already authorized. Main menu loaded.
auth_welcome:
Hi! I'm GradeSentinel. To get started, I need to verify that you're in our database.

Please press the button below to share your contact.
auth_placeholder: Press the button below to authorize
auth_role_admin: 👑 You are logged in as Super Administrator.
auth_role_head: 🏠 You are logged in as Family Head.
auth_role_parent: I will now send you notifications about new grades. 💡 How it works: • The bot checks the diary every 5 minutes • You will receive a notification for each new grade • Press {btn_grades} to see all grades for today
auth_not_linked_contact:
ℹ️ Hello, {name}.
Your number has been verified, but you are not currently linked to any family. Please wait for administrator action.
auth_phone_not_found:
❌ Sorry, your phone number was not found in our database.
Please contact the administrator to register.
rate_limited: ⏳ Too many requests. Please wait a few seconds.
status_global: 🛰 Global System Status 👥 Total families: {families} 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Registered parents: {parents} 🎓 Active students: {students} 🔄 Processed records: {history_records} ⚙️ Monitoring: Active
status_user: 📊 Your Statistics 🏠 Families: {families} 🎓 Children linked: {students} 🔄 History records: {history_records} 💡 The bot actively checks your children's diaries every 5 minutes.
user_panel_empty: 📱 Main Menu ℹ️ You are not linked to any family yet. What to do: 1. Ask your family head to tap 🔗 Invite relative and send you the link 2. Or tap 💬 Support below — the admin will help
admin_help: 🛠 GradeSentinel Admin Panel Use the buttons at the bottom to navigate between sections. The bot automatically removes old menus to keep the chat clean.
admin_no_access: ⛔ You don't have access to this command.
admin_no_families: 📭 No families in the database yet.
admin_families_list: 📋 All families: Select a family to manage:
admin_confirm_delete: Are you sure? This will delete all children and relatives from this family.
family_create_title:
🏗 *Create new family*

Enter the family name (surname):
family_name_empty: ❌ Name cannot be empty. Try again /add_family
family_choose_head: 📝 Family: {name} Do you want to become the head of this family or assign someone else?
family_account_not_found: ❌ Your account was not found in the database. Please authorize first.
family_created_self: ✅ Family '{name}' created! You are assigned as the head. You can now use 🏠 My Family to manage it.
family_error: ❌ An error occurred while creating the family. Please try again later.
family_fio_too_short: ❌ Name is too short. Try again /add_family
family_phone_invalid: ❌ Invalid phone format. Must be 12 digits (starting with 998). Try again /add_family
family_head_only: ⛔ This command is only available for family heads.
family_select:
🏠 You are the head of multiple families.

Please select a family to manage:
family_delete_prompt: Select who to *remove* from the family:
child_enter_url:
Send a link to the child's Google Sheet.
Or press 'Cancel':
child_url_invalid: ❌ Invalid Google Sheet link. Make sure it contains /spreadsheets/d/
child_url_no_id: ❌ Could not extract sheet ID from the link.
child_limit_reached: ⚠️ Limit reached: the family already has {count} children (maximum 5).
child_added: ✅ Child successfully added! 👤 Name: {name} 📊 Status: Monitoring activated 💡 You can check grades anytime using the '{btn_grades}' button
child_add_error: ❌ An error occurred while adding the child. Check the link and try later.
history_imported: 📚 Imported {count} grades from history for {name}. AI analysis will now work with the full picture!
ai_first_free: 🎁 Free AI analysis for your newly added child:
member_enter: Enter the relative's full name and phone number (separated by space): Example: Ivanov Ivan 998901234567 Or press 'Cancel'.
member_add_error: ❌ Error adding relative. Check the data format and try again.
grades_no_students: ℹ️ You have no linked students. Contact the administrator.
bot_alive: ✅ Bot is active No new grades received today. I'm monitoring the diary and will notify you as soon as a new entry appears.
support_prompt: 📝 Technical Support Describe your question, suggestion or issue. You can send text or photos. The administrator will respond as soon as possible.
support_sent: ✅ Message sent! Thank you for your feedback. The administrator has received your message and will reply here.
support_send_error: ❌ An error occurred while sending the message. Please try again later.
support_reply_fail: ❌ Delivery error: user has blocked the bot or has been deleted.
broadcast_prompt: 📢 News Broadcast Mode Send a message (text, photo or video) to broadcast to all registered users. You will have a chance to confirm before sending.
broadcast_confirm: Ready to send this message to all users in the database?
broadcast_no_message: ❌ Broadcast message not found. Please try again.
ai_unavailable: 🔧 AI analytics temporarily unavailable (API key not configured).
ai_no_students: ℹ️ You have no linked students for analysis.
ai_loading: 🤖 Analyzing grades... This may take a few seconds.
ai_not_enough_data: 📊 {name} ℹ️ Not enough data for analysis (need at least 2 grades in 14 days).
ai_prompt: You are a school AI analyst. Analyze the grades of student {name} for the last {days} days. Respond STRICTLY in this format (use HTML tags for bold): 📊 Summary: [number] grades | Average: [X.X] 5 — [N] | 4 — [N] | 3 — [N] | 2 — [N] ✅ Strengths: [subjects with best grades and scores] ⚠️ Attention: [subjects with 3s/2s, specific facts] — [brief explanation of patterns if any] 💡 Recommendation: [1-2 specific tips for parents, no generic advice like 'hire a tutor'] RULES: - Count grades accurately, do not make mistakes with numbers - Write ONLY in English - Do NOT use markdown (** or #), only HTML tags - Use max 3 emojis (📊 ✅ ⚠️ 💡 — only at block starts) - If there are few grades — say so, do not invent trends - Be specific: name subjects and scores, avoid filler - Entire response — no more than 8 lines Grades: {grades}
notify_changed_instant: 🔔 Mode changed: Instant notifications You will receive a notification for each new grade immediately.
notify_changed_summary: 🔕 Mode changed: Summary only You will only receive the evening summary (7PM). No instant notifications.
lang_select: 🌐 Выберите язык / Tilni tanlang / Select language:
invite_generated: 🔗 Invite link created! Send this link to your relative: {link} The link is valid for 48 hours and can be used once.
invite_invalid: ❌ This invite link is invalid or has already been used.
invite_accepted: ✅ Welcome! You have successfully joined the {family} family. You will now receive grade notifications.
invite_auth_required: 👋 You've been invited to join the {family} family! Please share your contact to confirm:
sub_no_family: ℹ️ You are not linked to any family.
sub_features: 📦 What's included: • Grade monitoring every 5 min • Instant notifications for new grades • Evening daily summary • AI performance analysis
sub_payment_summary: 💳 Subscription Payment 📦 Plan: {months} month(s) 💰 Amount: {amount} UZS Choose payment method:
sub_contact_admin_text: 💬 To subscribe, please use the 💬 Support button in the main menu.
sub_invoice_desc:
Subscription for {months} month(s). Price: {amount} UZS.
Automatic grade notifications, evening summaries, AI analysis.
sub_invoice_error: ❌ Could not create payment invoice. Please try later.
sub_payment_success: ✅ Payment successful! Your subscription is activated for {months} month(s). Thank you for supporting the project!
sub_card_instructions: 💰 Card Transfer 💳 Card number: {card_number} 👤 Recipient: {card_holder} 💰 Amount: {amount} UZS After transfer, press the button below — the admin will verify and activate your subscription.
sub_card_pending: ⏳ Awaiting confirmation The administrator received your request and will verify the payment. Your subscription will be activated after confirmation. This usually takes no more than 15 minutes.
sub_card_rejected_user: ❌ Unfortunately, your payment was not confirmed. If you're sure the transfer was made, please contact support.
sub_activated_notify: 🎉 Subscription activated! Your family has been granted a {months} month(s) subscription (until {end}). ✅ Grade monitoring — enabled ✅ AI analysis — available ✅ Evening summary — enabled
sub_required_ai: 🔒 AI Analysis is a premium feature An active subscription is required for AI analytics. Press 💳 Subscription to subscribe.
sub_grant_usage:
Usage: /grant_sub <family_id> <months>
Or just /grant_sub — for interactive selection.
sub_granted: ✅ Subscription granted to family #{family_id} for {months} month(s).
sub_grant_select_family: 👑 Grant subscription Select a family: (✅ — active, ❌ — inactive)
sub_promo_invalid: ❌ Promo code not found, already used, or expired.
sub_promo_success: ✅ Promo code {code} applied! Your subscription is activated for {months} month(s).
sub_promo_applied_info: 🎁 Promo code {code} gives {discount}% off. Choose a plan to apply.
sub_cancel_select: ❌ Cancel subscription Select a family to cancel subscription:
sub_cancel_confirm_prompt: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to cancel the subscription for family #{family_id}? The subscription will be deactivated immediately.
sub_cancel_no_active: ℹ️ No families with active subscriptions.
sub_cancelled_admin: ✅ Subscription for family #{family_id} has been cancelled.
sub_cancelled_notify: ⚠️ Subscription deactivated Your subscription has been cancelled by the administrator. Contact support to renew.
sub_expiry_7d: ⏳ Subscription expires in 7 days Renew early to keep access to notifications and AI analysis.
sub_expiry_1d: ⚠️ Subscription expires tomorrow! Renew now to avoid interruption of grade monitoring.
sub_expiry_0d: ❌ Subscription expired Grade monitoring has been paused. Press 💳 Subscription to renew.
admin_prices_enter: ✏️ Enter new price for {plan} plan (in UZS, e.g.: 29900):
admin_prices_invalid: ❌ Invalid amount. Enter a number greater than 0.
help_parent: 📖 Help — GradeSentinel What the bot does: Monitors your children's grades in the electronic diary and instantly notifies you about new entries. Menu buttons: 📈 Grades — view today's grades 🤖 AI Analysis — detailed 14-day performance analysis (subscription) 💳 Subscription — manage subscription 🔔 Notifications — instant or evening summary 💬 Support — contact administrator ⚙️ Language — change interface language Automation: • Diary check every 5 minutes • Evening daily summary • Weekly AI report (Sun 7PM) /help — this help page
help_head: You are a family head. Additional features: 🏠 My Family — family management: • 🧒 Add child (Google Sheet link) • 🔗 Invite relative (invite link) • 📋 List and remove members
help_admin: Administration: 🛠 Admin Panel — centralized admin panel: • 🏠 Families — view and manage • ➕ New Family — create • 💰 Pricing — change prices • 🎁 Promo Codes — create and manage • 👑 Grant / ❌ Cancel subscription • 📢 Broadcast — message to all • 📊 System statistics
